settings.title: Configuration
settings.showReasoningDesc: Display the model's thinking process when using DeepSeek Reasoner.
settings.developerModeDesc: Enables manual map instruction injection and debug tools.

chat.enterSend: Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line

dialog.parseError: Failed to parse the file. Please ensure it is a valid JSON.
dialog.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This action cannot be undone and may affect the branch history.
dialog.apiDesc: You need to configure your API Key in the Settings to use AI features.
dialog.conflictsDesc: Please resolve all conflicts (Character or Record overlaps) before sending a new message.
dialog.analysisDesc: Failed to parse the record response from AI.
dialog.authErrorDesc: API key is invalid or has expired. Please check your API key in Settings.
dialog.rateLimitErrorDesc: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
dialog.loginRequiredDesc: Please login first to use AI services

onboarding.step2Desc: Get your API key from DeepSeek official website
onboarding.step2Help: Visit {url} to get your API key
onboarding.step3SettingDesc: Setting Mode: Create novel outlines, character settings, world-building, and other foundational elements
onboarding.step3StoryDesc: Story Mode: Write the main narrative content of your novel
onboarding.step4RecordDesc: Click the record button below messages, AI will automatically analyze content and update the plot summary, character list, and long-term memory in the right panel
onboarding.step4FlashDesc: Or enable Fast Creation mode, which automatically performs record analysis after content generation
onboarding.step5Desc: Click 'New Story' to begin your creative journey
onboarding.step5NewStoryDesc: Click the 'New Story' button in the sidebar to start creating. You'll begin in Setting mode by default.
onboarding.step5HelpDocDesc: View complete feature guides and tutorials. Refer here anytime you have questions.

guide.settingModeDesc: Click the 📖 button next to a message to add it to the novel setting. After completing settings, it will automatically switch to Story mode to start writing.
